## Tests

- [ ] Tests run, or reason stated

## Release Checklist

Complete this section only for release PRs, meaning PRs from `release/*` branches or PRs labeled `release`.

- [ ] `pyproject.toml` version bumped
- [ ] `package.json` version bumped
- [ ] `package-lock.json` root/package versions bumped
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has a section for the release version
- [ ] Production `APP_VERSION` will be set to the same version
- [ ] Git tag will be created after merge, e.g. `v1.1.1`
